Test Scenario: User can sign in with valid credentials
Test Steps: 1. Open app. 2. Enter valid email and password. 3. Tap Sign In.
Expected Result: User is logged in and sees Dashboard tab content.

Test Scenario: Login shows error when credentials are empty
Test Steps: 1. Open app. 2. Leave email or password blank. 3. Tap Sign In.
Expected Result: Alert appears asking to enter both email and password.

Test Scenario: Login shows error for invalid credentials
Test Steps: 1. Open app. 2. Enter wrong email or password. 3. Tap Sign In.
Expected Result: Error alert is shown; user remains on login screen.

Test Steps: 1. Open app when not logged in.
Expected Result: Logo and "Hapyjo Ltd" and "Road Construction Management" text are visible.

Test Scenario: User can sign out from Settings
Test Steps: 1. Log in. 2. Go to Settings tab. 3. Tap Sign out. 4. Confirm in alert.
Expected Result: User is signed out and login screen is shown.

Test Scenario: App shows loading then content after session restore
Test Steps: 1. Log in and close app. 2. Reopen app.
Expected Result: Loading appears briefly then main app with tabs is shown.

Test Steps: 1. Log in as admin. 2. Check visible tabs.
Expected Result: Dashboard Reports Tasks Users Sites Vehicles Expenses Surveys Issues GPS Camera Settings visible per RBAC.

Test Steps: 1. Log in as driver_truck or driver_machine.
Expected Result: Only Dashboard Tasks Issues GPS Camera Settings tabs are visible.

Test Steps: 1. Log in. 2. Tap Reports tab. 3. Tap Settings tab.
Expected Result: Content area updates to Reports then to Settings.

Test Steps: 1. Log in as head_supervisor or admin. 2. Go to Sites. 3. Tap a site.
Expected Result: Site detail screen shows with name location budget and assignments.

Test Scenario: Settings opens Driver Profile for driver role
Test Steps: 1. Log in as driver. 2. Go to Settings. 3. Tap Personal info.
Expected Result: Driver profile screen opens with name email phone.

Test Scenario: Back from site detail returns to sites list
Test Steps: 1. Open site detail from Sites. 2. Tap back.
Expected Result: Sites list is shown again.

Test Scenario: Admin dashboard loads with summary cards
Test Steps: 1. Log in as admin. 2. Stay on Dashboard.
Expected Result: Admin dashboard shows active sites work volume truck distance machine hours.

Test Steps: 1. Log in as owner. 2. View Dashboard.
Expected Result: Owner dashboard shows sites and business metrics.

Test Scenario: Assistant supervisor sees site and tasks
Test Steps: 1. Log in as assistant_supervisor. 2. View Dashboard.
Expected Result: Site card and Tasks at site and Reassign drivers link are visible.

Test Steps: 1. Log in as driver. 2. View Dashboard.
Expected Result: Driver dashboard shows task summary and link to Tasks tab.

Test Scenario: Add user modal opens and creates user
Test Steps: 1. Log in as admin or owner or head_supervisor. 2. Go to Users. 3. Tap Add user. 4. Enter name role phone site and save.
Expected Result: New user is created; list updates; success or credentials shown.

Test Steps: 1. Open Add user modal. 2. Leave name empty. 3. Submit.
Expected Result: Validation prevents submit or shows error.

Test Scenario: Search filters users by name or role
Test Steps: 1. Go to Users. 2. Type in search box.
Expected Result: List filters to matching name or role; counts update.

Test Steps: 1. Go to Users. 2. Toggle a user's active switch.
Expected Result: User active state updates; active/inactive counts reflect change.

Test Steps: 1. Go to Users. 2. Tap reset password for a user.
Expected Result: Credentials or confirmation shown; user can copy.

Test Scenario: Create new site opens modal and saves
Test Steps: 1. Log in as head_supervisor. 2. Go to Sites. 3. Tap Create new site. 4. Enter name location budget and submit.
Expected Result: New site appears in list.

Test Steps: 1. Go to Sites as head_supervisor. 2. Tap Allocate budget. 3. Select site enter amount and save.
Expected Result: Site budget is updated.

Test Steps: 1. Open site detail. 2. Assign assistant supervisor surveyor drivers vehicles. 3. Tap Save assignments.
Expected Result: Success; assignments are persisted.

Test Scenario: Site detail shows spent and progress
Test Steps: 1. Open any site detail.
Expected Result: Spent amount and progress are displayed.

Test Scenario: Filter by All Truck Machine works
Test Steps: 1. Go to Vehicles. 2. Tap Truck then Machine then All.
Expected Result: List shows only trucks then only machines then all.

Test Scenario: Add Truck modal saves new truck
Test Steps: 1. Go to Vehicles. 2. Tap Add Truck. 3. Select site enter vehicle number mileage tank capacity and save.
Expected Result: New truck appears in list under site.

Test Scenario: Add Machine modal saves new machine
Test Steps: 1. Tap Add Machine. 2. Fill site vehicle number hours per litre tank capacity. 3. Save.
Expected Result: New machine appears in list.

Test Steps: 1. Open Add Truck. 2. Leave tank capacity or mileage empty or zero. 3. Submit.
Expected Result: Validation prevents save or shows error.

Test Steps: 1. Log in as assistant_supervisor. 2. Go to Expenses. 3. Tap Add expense. 4. Select site amount description date and submit.
Expected Result: Expense appears in list.

Test Steps: 1. Go to Expenses. 2. Tap Add fuel expense. 3. Select site vehicle litres cost per litre and submit.
Expected Result: Fuel expense is saved and listed.

Test Steps: 1. Go to Expenses.
Expected Result: Expenses are shown grouped by site.

Test Scenario: New survey modal parses CSV and submits
Test Steps: 1. Log in as surveyor. 2. Go to Surveys. 3. Tap New. 4. Select site enter before/after CSV tap Parse and submit.
Expected Result: Survey is submitted and appears in list.

Test Steps: 1. Log in as assistant_supervisor. 2. Go to Surveys. 3. In Submitted open one and tap Approve.
Expected Result: Survey moves to approved list.

Test Steps: 1. Go to Surveys as surveyor or assistant.
Expected Result: Approved surveys section shows approved items.

Test Scenario: Raise issue with description and images
Test Steps: 1. Log in as driver or assistant_supervisor. 2. Go to Issues. 3. Tap Raise issue. 4. Select site enter description optionally add images and submit.
Expected Result: Issue is created and appears in list.

Test Steps: 1. Go to Issues. 2. Tap a site chip (not All).
Expected Result: List shows only issues for that site.

Test Steps: 1. Go to Issues.
Expected Result: Each issue shows description status badge site and date.

Test Scenario: Start trip modal saves and shows in progress
Test Steps: 1. Log in as driver. 2. Go to Tasks. 3. Tap start trip/session. 4. Select vehicle enter load and fuel at start and submit.
Expected Result: Trip/session is started; in-progress card appears.

Test Steps: 1. With an active trip tap End. 2. Optionally add GPS photo and location. 3. Submit.
Expected Result: Trip is ended; it appears in trip list.

Test Scenario: Supervisor can select driver and see trips
Test Steps: 1. Log in as head_supervisor or assistant_supervisor. 2. Go to Tasks. 3. Select a driver from dropdown.
Expected Result: Trips and stats for selected driver are shown.

Test Scenario: Daily and monthly trip stats visible
Test Steps: 1. Go to Tasks as driver or supervisor.
Expected Result: Daily/monthly trip count distance fuel stats are displayed.

Test Scenario: Capture and upload flow saves GPS photo
Test Steps: 1. Log in as driver. 2. Go to GPS Camera. 3. Use Upload photo or Capture; select image and complete flow.
Expected Result: Status shows success; record saved to gps_photos.

Test Scenario: Reports screen loads with filter tabs
Test Steps: 1. Log in as admin or owner or head_supervisor or accountant. 2. Go to Reports.
Expected Result: Filter tabs (All Financial Operations Site Performance) and report list are visible.

Test Steps: 1. Go to Reports as admin/owner/head_supervisor. 2. Tap Generate report.
Expected Result: New report is created and appears in list; success alert.

Test Scenario: Export CSV opens share or saves file
Test Steps: 1. Go to Reports. 2. Open a report card. 3. Tap Export CSV.
Expected Result: File is generated and share dialog or save works.

Test Steps: 1. Log in as accountant. 2. Go to Reports.
Expected Result: Generate report button is hidden or disabled; list is view-only.

Test Scenario: Fuel summary site and date filters work
Test Steps: 1. Go to Reports. 2. Select site and date range in fuel summary.
Expected Result: Vehicle fuel summary updates for selected site and dates.

Test Scenario: Financial summary visible for allowed roles
Test Steps: 1. Log in as admin or owner or head_supervisor or accountant. 2. Go to Reports.
Expected Result: Financial summary section is visible.

Test Scenario: Settings shows user name email and role
Test Steps: 1. Log in. 2. Go to Settings.
Expected Result: User card shows correct name email and role badge.

Test Steps: 1. Go to Settings. 2. Tap Change password. 3. Enter new password and confirm (min 6 chars). 4. Submit.
Expected Result: Success alert; modal closes; password updated.

Test Steps: 1. Open Change password. 2. Enter different values in new and confirm. 3. Submit.
Expected Result: Alert shows mismatch message.

Test Steps: 1. Go to Settings. 2. Tap Language. 3. Select other locale.
Expected Result: Language label updates; app text uses new locale.

Test Steps: 1. Go to Settings. 2. Toggle Notifications.
Expected Result: Toggle state changes (no push implementation required for demo).

Test Steps: 1. Log in as assistant_supervisor or driver. 2. From dashboard or Tasks open a task.
Expected Result: Task detail shows title description priority status site due date.

Test Steps: 1. Open task detail. 2. Enter progress percentage. 3. Tap Save Progress.
Expected Result: Progress is updated and displayed.

Test Steps: 1. Open task. 2. Tap Complete Task. 3. Confirm.
Expected Result: Task is marked complete; confirmation shown.

Test Steps: 1. Log in as assistant_supervisor. 2. Dashboard tap Reassign drivers to vehicles. 3. Select site assign drivers to vehicles. 4. Tap Save.
Expected Result: Assignments are saved.

Test Scenario: Driver can edit name and phone
Test Steps: 1. Log in as driver. 2. Settings > Personal info. 3. Tap Edit. 4. Change name or phone and Save.
Expected Result: Profile updates; changes visible on return.

Test Scenario: Dashboard and tabs load without crash
Test Steps: 1. Log in with each role (admin owner head_supervisor accountant assistant_supervisor surveyor driver).
Expected Result: Each role sees correct dashboard and tabs; no crash.
